differential_diagnoses: Metastatic malignancy with paraneoplastic or septic complications
Staphylococcal aureus sepsis with metastatic endophthalmitis
next_steps: Urgent ophthalmology consultation for vitreous tap and potential diagnostic vitrectomy
Percutaneous biopsy of pulmonary or hepatic lesions for histopathology and specialized culture
Blood cultures with specific request for Burkholderia pseudomallei and slow-growing organisms
Transesophageal echocardiography to rule out endocarditis
Review of environmental history and occupational exposures
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics with activity against B. pseudomallei (e.g., Ceftazidime or Meropenem)

differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae infection with metastatic endophthalmitis and liver abscess
Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Candida or invasive mold)
next_steps: Urgent ophthalmology evaluation with vitreous tap and intraocular antibiotic injection
Percutaneous image-guided biopsy of the liver abscess for pathology and specialized cultures
HbA1c and plasma glucose testing to assess for undiagnosed diabetes mellitus
Transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for vegetation
Broad-spectrum antimicrobial therapy transition to cover hypervirulent Klebsiella (e.g., carbapenem or ceftazidime) and potential Melioidosis
HIV serology and screening for immunocompromising conditions
Blood and abscess fluid cultures specifically requesting incubation for Burkholderia and extended time for slow-growing organisms
